name: Hawaiian Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
2. Dust the chicken in flour, shaking off any excess.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add chicken to the skillet in batches and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
5. In a bowl, whisk together pineapple juice, sugar, chicken bouillon, vinegar, and soy sauce.
6. Stir in cornstarch until dissolved.
7. Pour the liquid mixture over the chicken pieces, coating them evenly.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 20-25 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
9. Add pineapple chunks and return to a simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Turn off heat and serve with the pineapple sauce.
